recommendedBackend: Airtable first, Postgres/API later if automation grows

fieldTypes.tags: Multi-select or linked table if normalized
fieldTypes.source_urls: URL / long text in imported CSV; normalize via Player source links for production
fieldTypes.relationship_status: Single select: Needs confirmation, Confirmed, Not relevant, Sensitive, Archived
fieldTypes.claim_type: Single select: Verified fact, Interpretation, Hypothesis, Needs internal data
fieldTypes.refresh_cadence: Single select: Weekly, Monthly, Quarterly, Before exec review

automations: Weekly source health check writes access_status and last_url_check.
Credentialed metrics job writes to live-overrides.json shape or an API equivalent.
Relationship owner reminder triggers when status is Needs confirmation and key_player is true.
Board export gate flags records with unresolved High-priority backlog tasks.
